title: Add regression test for accessing array-ed interfaces declared with short nomenclature

features.name: interface_array_short_nomenclature_member_access
features.description: Code should include an interface array declared with short array nomenclature [N] (non-zero-based) and then accessing a member of an indexed element using dot notation.
features.snippet:
interface my_intf; logic valid; modport i(output valid); endinterface
module top; my_intf.t arr_if [2] (); wire x = arr_if[0].valid; endmodule

features.name: interface_array_non_zero_based_indexing
features.description: Code should include an interface array port connection using short nomenclature [N] where N represents the array size without explicit range bounds.
